native.preamble:
require "json"

module SolvaPay
  module NativeDispatch
    CLIENT_METHODS = %w[
native.postamble:
].freeze

    RAW_VERIFY_WEBHOOK = SolvaPay.method(:verify_webhook)
    RAW_VERIFY_WEBHOOK_AT = SolvaPay.method(:_verify_webhook_at)

    module_function

    def native_module
      SolvaPay.const_get(:Native, false)
    end

    def build_client(api_key:, api_base_url: nil)
      native_module.const_get(:Client, false).new(api_key, api_base_url)
    end

    def call_client(client, name, args)
      method_name = name.to_s
      unless CLIENT_METHODS.include?(method_name)
        raise SolvaPayError.new("SolvaPay native client missing method: #{method_name}", code: "missing_native_method", kind: "Transport", retryable: false)
      end

      unwrap(client.public_send(method_name, JSON.generate(args)))
    rescue SolvaPayError, PaywallError
      raise
    rescue StandardError => e
      raise SolvaPayError.new(e.message, code: "native_call_failed", kind: "Transport", retryable: false), cause: e
    end

    def call_sync(name, args)
      method_name = name.to_s
      unless SYNC_METHODS.include?(method_name)
        raise SolvaPayError.new("SolvaPay native binding missing sync method: #{method_name}", code: "missing_native_method", kind: "Transport", retryable: false)
      end

      unwrap(native_module.public_send(method_name, JSON.generate(args)))
    rescue SolvaPayError, PaywallError
      raise
    rescue StandardError => e
      raise SolvaPayError.new(e.message, code: "native_call_failed", kind: "Transport", retryable: false), cause: e
    end

    def verify_webhook(body:, signature:, secret:)
      JSON.parse(RAW_VERIFY_WEBHOOK.call(body, signature, secret))
    rescue SolvaPayError
      raise
    rescue StandardError => e
      code = e.respond_to?(:code) ? e.public_send(:code) : nil
      raise SolvaPayError.new(e.message, code: code, kind: "Webhook", retryable: false), cause: e
    end

    def verify_webhook_at(body:, signature:, secret:, now_unix_secs:)
      JSON.parse(RAW_VERIFY_WEBHOOK_AT.call(body, signature, secret, now_unix_secs))
    rescue SolvaPayError
      raise
    rescue StandardError => e
      code = e.respond_to?(:code) ? e.public_send(:code) : nil
      raise SolvaPayError.new(e.message, code: code, kind: "Webhook", retryable: false), cause: e
    end

    def unwrap(envelope_json)
      envelope = JSON.parse(envelope_json)
      unless envelope.is_a?(Hash) && [true, false].include?(envelope["ok"])
        raise SolvaPayError.new("SolvaPay native binding returned malformed envelope", code: "malformed_envelope", kind: "Transport", retryable: false)
      end
      return envelope["value"] if envelope["ok"]

      error = envelope["error"]
      unless error.is_a?(Hash)
        raise SolvaPayError.new("SolvaPay native binding returned malformed envelope", code: "malformed_envelope", kind: "Transport", retryable: false)
      end

      raise reconstruct_error(error)
    rescue JSON::ParserError => e
      raise SolvaPayError.new("SolvaPay native binding returned invalid JSON envelope", code: "invalid_envelope", kind: "Transport", retryable: false), cause: e
    end

    def reconstruct_error(error)
      kind = error["kind"]
      message = error["message"] || "SolvaPay error"
      return PaywallError.new(message, error["gate"].is_a?(Hash) ? error["gate"] : {}) if kind == "Paywall"

      SolvaPayError.new(
        message,
        code: error["code"],
        status: error["status"].is_a?(Integer) ? error["status"] : nil,
        kind: kind,
        retryable: error["retryable"],
      )
    end
  end
end
